case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JUAN SANCHEZ VALVERIO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALVERIO, JUAN SANCHEZ $1,794.98 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,959.98 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-03-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VALVERIO, JUAN SANCHEZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2018 BY PRO TEM ANNE WONG. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OPORTUN INC.
